title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Berger Silk Store - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
